name: Lenders Choice Credit Solutions
description_short: Dallas-area credit repair company that audits credit files and files customized dispute letters with all three bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies on a pay-per-deletion model.
description_long:
Lenders Choice Credit Solutions is a credit repair company serving consumers in the Dallas, Texas area. Their work centers on credit file remediation — auditing client reports and filing disputes to remove inaccurate, outdated, unverifiable, or incomplete derogatory accounts. No founding year, staff credentials, or state licensing information is disclosed on their website. The company operates as a private, for-profit credit repair firm with no publicly listed CDFI, HUD, NFCC, or similar certifications.

Their process begins with an initial credit audit — $199 for individuals or $350 for couples — charged as a one-time fee after the audit completes. From there, they file customized dispute letters targeting late payments, charge-offs, collections, bankruptcies (Chapter 7 and 13), foreclosures, and repossessions with Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion, as well as directly with original creditors and collection agencies. Ongoing work is priced at $50 per account deleted per credit bureau, with a minimum monthly payment of $100 toward any accumulated deletion balance. Monthly progress tracking is included throughout the engagement.

The results-based pricing model stands out in a market dominated by flat monthly subscriptions. Clients pay only when items are actually removed, which aligns company incentives with client outcomes. This is reinforced by an explicit money-back guarantee: if the client's credit score does not improve, Lenders Choice refunds the money. The company also files disputes directly with original creditors and collection agencies — a broader scope than many competitors. Their Google rating of 4.8/5 across 133 reviews reflects consistent client satisfaction over a meaningful volume of engagements.

The pay-per-deletion model is consumer-friendly in principle but can compound quickly: removing five accounts across all three bureaus would cost $750 in deletion fees alone, on top of the initial audit. The website does not disclose state licensing, bond information, or visible Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) compliance language — a notable gap given federal requirements for credit repair firms. No founding year, team credentials, or accreditations are publicly listed, making independent verification of experience difficult. The company's blog also shows signs of SEO spam injection, which raises minor questions about website maintenance practices. Best suited to consumers with multiple clearly disputable derogatory items who prefer a performance-based fee structure over an open-ended monthly subscription.\n\nIn the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: If Lenders Choice does not help you increase your credit score, they refund your money. Specific terms and conditions beyond this statement are not detailed on their website.

tiers.name: Individual Credit Repair
features: One-time $199 audit fee (charged after audit completes)
$50 per account deleted per credit bureau
Customized dispute letters to all three bureaus
Disputes filed with original creditors and collection agencies

tiers.name: Couple Credit Repair
features: One-time $350 audit fee for two people (charged after audit completes)
$50 per account deleted per credit bureau per person
Customized dispute letters to all three bureaus for both partners
Disputes filed with original creditors and collection agencies
Monthly progress tracking for both credit files

pros: Pay-per-deletion pricing ($50/account/bureau) — you only pay when items are actually removed, not a flat monthly fee regardless of results
Money-back guarantee if your credit score does not improve
Disputes filed with all three bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) AND directly with original creditors and collection agencies
Covers a broad range of derogatory items: late payments, charge-offs, collections, Chapter 7 and 13 bankruptcies, foreclosures, and repossessions
Claims to write customized dispute letters rather than generic templates
Strong Google rating of 4.8/5 from 133 reviews — substantial volume for a local credit repair firm
Couple pricing ($350 flat audit) offers meaningful savings over paying two individual audit fees
cons: Per-deletion fees accumulate fast — removing 5 accounts across all 3 bureaus costs $750 in deletion fees alone, on top of the $199 audit
No state licensing, bond amounts, or visible CROA (Credit Repair Organizations Act) disclosures on the website — a federal compliance concern
No founding year, staff credentials, or team bios disclosed publicly, making it difficult to verify experience
No proprietary client portal — clients must use a third-party credit monitoring service to track their own progress
Company blog shows signs of SEO spam injection, raising questions about website security and ongoing maintenance
best_for: Dallas-area consumers with multiple derogatory accounts (collections, charge-offs, late payments) who want to pay only for verified removals
Individuals or couples preparing for a mortgage, auto loan, or major credit application in the near term
Consumers who have been burned by flat-fee monthly subscription credit repair services with no tangible results
People with mixed derogatory types (bankruptcies, foreclosures, repossessions) who need disputes filed across bureaus and creditors simultaneously
diagnosis: Lenders Choice Credit Solutions is best suited to Dallas-area consumers with several clearly disputable derogatory items who want accountability built into the pricing structure — you don't pay ongoing fees unless accounts are actually deleted. The primary caveat is transparency: the company discloses no licensing credentials, CROA compliance language, or verifiable staff background on its website, which is a meaningful gap for any credit repair firm operating under federal law.
services: Customized dispute letters to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Dispute filing directly with original creditors
Credit-building consultation and secured credit card guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 465 W President George Bush Hwy ste 103, Richardson, TX 75080
meta_description: Dallas-area credit repair company that audits credit files and disputes with bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies on a pay-per-deletion model.
